description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with two stages: build and pages. Add a build job in the build stage that runs npm install --only=dev, npm install --global grunt-cli, grunt, mkdir public, and mv {content,css,js,lib,plugin}/ index.html pdf.css public/. The build job should publish the public/ directory as an artifact named public that expires in 31 days. Add a pages job in the pages stage that depends on the build job, runs only on the master branch, has an empty script, and publishes the public/ directory as its artifact. Ensure the jobs follow the defined stage order.
